title: Glow Ores Vanilla (Without Optifine)
description: This resource pack will GLOW the ORES and some Minecraft blocks WITHOUT Optifine/Sodium/Embeddium, etc. totally vanilla
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071108/description_bfb45e7a-c8e3-4d12-8fd6-beb13809d70d.png) This resource pack will glow the ores and some Minecraft blocks WITHOUT Optifine/Sodium/Embeddium, etc. totally vanilla!

***

**All the minerals with this resourcepack will be shiny and quite attractive to the player! This Resourcepack DOESN'T REQUIRES OPTIFINE, SODIUM OR EMBEDDIUM!**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071108/description_bd9eef38-6cd9-434f-a5a0-b6b4ecfe012c.png) ## _I'm using Optifine/Sodium/Embeddium and Glow Ores don't work, what should I do?_  If you are using Optifine, Sodium or Embeddium, you must download this resourcepack: [Glow Ores Universal (Optifine,Sodium,Embeddium)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/glow-ores-universal) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1071108/description_93180736-674c-45bc-8462-2a3d9c25bdf6.png) If you like to support us, you can Join our  Discord or Support us monetarily on our  Patreon**
**
